creator: jochem@jochem.dyndns.org
text:
either pkg_plist of net/gaim (version 0.43) is incorrectly specified, or the files are installed
	in an incorrect directory. When i do a 'make deinstall', for all the pixmaps, i get these kind of errors:

	pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/gnome/pixmaps/gaim/cancel.xpm' doesn't really exist

	The pixmaps are actually installed in /usr/X11R6/share/pixmaps/gaim/

How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/net/gaim && make install && make deinstall
